content:
Lore test 
Does anyone know how he knows so much about sewers ?
she and her brother tried to run away from police
I'm pretty sure Lei is a girl

Her brother got shot 16 times in the sewer 🥲
That was so painful to read
like mouse😌
yeah, there are so many tearful moments in this game
Are there any guides as to recommended cards to use on characters?
In this server or something.

Can someone explain to me how this happened ?
Death resistance dropped from 430 energy to like 40 from first time that death resistance been triggered so i was only  able to use it once
In story mod i can use it at least 3 times
So, the way to use Liz is to use as much of her Shield attack first? Before using her Ult to use all her Poison attack?
that f**king crazy dog has very high hits attack. it kill you once and once.
430 → 215 → 107 → 54 → 27， here just triggered 4 times, as the number of hits
once you triggered D.R., ur HP become 1 point, and next hit kill you again, then D.R. check again.

So did u have the sams issue ? Cuz that's bs 
He was at 50 hp and im like fuck
It didn't check again in my case 🙈
This is the yellow element mod only
D.R. help you keep 1 HP once under 1 hit, not lock at 1 HP during 1 turn.
so u should know that, D.R. was not that useful for high hits attack.

Yeah i just relaized that because usually it triggers again after i get some hp back
Thanks for your help 🙂
🤪  you can let 萝坦 equip 切割与伤害, and enhanced it with 镜像, then she could make the crazy dog become a cute puppy.
🤪  i hate the bee-like monster most, it even never relax! just attack, attack and attack!
Honestly there are still items idk what they do  because of the stupid English translator that generates some random words that i don't get what it means

hhahaha, IKR....
I'm tryiing to figure out how Liz works....
She's more of a slow stack attacker.
bruuuh.
Stack Stack Stack then Ultimate.
Purple is a chore. NGL

I added one Chinese guy from this server as friend 
His posts gets like 50 comments 😂
He even make some contents on YouTube which helped me to build the right team
Yoooo... FR... does he have build for cards for F2P?
hahahha, I
I have been contemplating, but I think I'm doing some things wrong in regards to building my team and what card works or not.

Idk but this is his channel  喵嗚的遊戲天地
His blue team build is very famous 
He just uploaded new video
oh, i know someone name 喵呜 in dc
his video in EN ?

No Chinese but i believe he doesn't speak 
He speak to me in English tho using translator
Blud....
I haven't used English for conversation in a few years, sometimes I still need translation to help me with spelling.
the big things is, i dont know how to say things/names/items in Morimens in EN
I live in Australia and i deal with none English speaking Chinese everyday so I'm very used to this 😂
i had upload some of my record to YTB
one set is about main quest, using original 4 characters.
one set is about 无光之境, i call it as Realm of Darkness
yeah I did follow your guide on that Chapter 1 boss... but bruuuh... I didnt get lucky.
the daily quest, 幻梦深潜, i call it Deep Dive, it has a Rank list
Red helped me clear it with 1 revive.
i was considering make a video talk about the "Pizza"
What level are u guys ?
u could just click on the character to see how they build their team
use Deep Dive Rank as a reference
ooooh nice
focus on team, don't care about the rank order, or score.
yeah yeah
i've been looking for this
thank you very much
Bro doesnt even attack twice or smth in a turn so my counters only do like 150 dmg to him per turn
Does the point on this mode stack? inorder to be able to get all the rewards
its over a week
every day, play a Deep Dive run is OK. Rewards was similar.
every week, got 5000 points score is OK.

24 is broken
I have never felt i have broken team until i got her
Yeah, like what I mean is, I can get like 1000 per run. If I play 5 runs will I get all 5000 points for the rewrads?
yes
Yes.... She is fucking broken.
Sometimes when I dont need Shield and I'm lucky to smash her X. I just go ham with a big number.
play 1 run get as 4000+ more, or play 5 more times with 1000points each time. All is OK.
and then she just hits everything like crazy.
Now if only I had an ultimate.
I'm triggered that I have to take 27 hits first before that poison takes effect.
I think I'm too addicted to this game, I've neglected the others that I play.

I had something similar but all zeros of 24's cards 😂
The zero cards are very interesting in this game especially when u pair them with (effect twice) upgrade lol
So... ummmm.... I need clarification. I've pulled 3 SSR from Featured Banner, but I didn't get Tulu/Turu from anyone.
I thought I was guaranteed featured character on third SSR?

That's weird 
I got him on the second pitty
the translation says the second pitty must a featured banner
But it also mentions chances so it could the guarantee chances which is 5% increases
guarantee is on your 4th SSR
I can send my history... but....
WTF👀
https://tenor.com/view/pepe-cry-reading-pepe-the-frog-sad-gif-17607942
Here you go
I read it as 3 characters before now, didnt bother checking again after.
However, the fact that I actually have this much bad luck is insane.
I'm done with that banner.
Well, atleast you have guarantee for the next banner

That makes it as bad as Genshin 😂😂😂
At least Genshin still give u 50/50 chances while this game gives u 30% chance.....
The reason why it even stuck to me as 3 is because I know some other games actually do it as guaranteed at 3.
but at 4?
hmmmm....
and I happen to be the unlucky soul that hits that amount.
I've thankful i only pulled 5 after the previous SSR otherwise, I'd be crying harder even.

30 rolls ssr pity 
On fourth ssr is guaranteed 
Worst case its 120 pulls. And you got 3 other ssr with 120 pulls
help, i dont undertand how it works and its effect for my party (sorry for my bad english)
It's like rune/equipment for the character
Each piece gives you some stats and there are set effects too
Farmable?

The pvp system is so bad that i dont see any posts about it 
Now i understand why some Chinese players were saying remove pvp on fb comments

Actual card effect is 15%
English translators 159%
Yes
The pvp gameplay is based on another game that the studio created in the past
Hahahhaha, yeah, the translators are always on crack.

It's understandable, there has to be content. And that is usually one of the way to go.
But if its that bad, they should think about what to do. Good game nonetheless, I don't usually do PvP in most games.

Very satisfying indeed. 
Boss died from Poison after the round ended.

I got Liz's card from the selector after making my way to 300 pulls this evening. 
Even after pulling on Tulu's banner again 27 times, I didn't get him, so I'm 3 away from guarantee but I wont use that on him.

Wow 800 poison
I guess i should replace my blue poison dealer

It worked so well with this boss, with the game mechanics against shields being that the number of hits determine how much reflect the enemy gets, its the same with Liz shield, she gets more cards the more hits the enemy deals when she puts forward her own shield.
And this boss just happens to want to hit 4+ times.
Lol
However, I think the stage played a huge role, because there's probably a buff or something, for Purple? Not sure.
You get 1/2 fixed artifact when you start iirc
Half fixed artifact?
1 or 2
I'm sort of confused. Are you asking how many artifacts I started with or...?

Wth is artefacts ? 
Im level 18
I mean I'm fine with it
I think it's nice
You got one copy of the first played card each turn, and when you enter ur extra turn the cards u save will be doubled
Lvl 35
The things you get that are shown at the top of the screen when you play the stage
I'm saying that those stages usually will give you a fixed artifact, that usually have strong effects
